textByHash.cc709c383749dd5fab304a6c1c4ac75026723a28: Hey, fancy having a go at our agility course?
textByHash.e2380c47efcbe0fc4c1a5a179bc7f1141db51ddc: Just head up the ladder to get started. Try not to fall!
textByHash.90f4b831fd46702feca97038f54781a1bdf3c4f3: You've not completed any laps of our agility course yet. There's been global completions and the global best time is .
textByHash.b44f420afed3130496977c8b1c65890e114e6781: Hey, I see you've been having a go at our agility course.
textByHash.6e9f8de1a48da9236fc0857d2199571719d3e2c8: I like to keep an eye on everyone who gives it a go. Speaking of which, want to know more about how you've been doing?
textByHash.488ed6412e1eb4130fb38e4beca453aaaedde90e: You've completed laps of our agility course with a best time of . There's been global completions and the global best time is .
